title: My First Cruise
content: Sophia had never traveled on a cruise ship before. As the ship left the harbor, she stood on the deck and watched the coastline slowly disappear. Everything felt exciting and new. The ship was much larger than she expected, with restaurants, shops, and even a swimming pool. During the trip, Sophia explored different areas, attended shows, and enjoyed meals with beautiful ocean views. In the evenings, she liked walking on the deck while listening to the sound of the waves. By the end of the cruise, she already wanted to plan another voyage.
